creator: david.vionnet@vmailbox.org
text:
Edbrowse is a browser, text editor, and mail client whose interface is
similar to /bin/ed/ with added support for Perl compatible regular
expressions. It's able to deal with cookies, SSL connections and
JavaScript. It depends on ftp/curl, devel/pcre and lang/spidermonkey185.
While primarily intended for use by blind users, it's simply a generic
and convenient tool for manipulating text in Web pages.
